name: Ukraine-Russia War
overview: Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine began February 24, 2022, following the 2014 Donbas conflict. Fighting spans 1,000km frontline with mass civilian displacement.

name: Israel-Hamas War
overview: War began October 7, 2023 with Hamas attacks on Israel. Israeli military campaign in Gaza has caused massive civilian casualties and infrastructure destruction.

name: Sudan Civil War
overview: War between SAF and RSF began April 2023, creating the world's largest displacement crisis with 8+ million IDPs and refugees.

name: Myanmar Civil War
overview: Military coup of February 2021 triggered nationwide resistance. Three Brotherhood Alliance offensive in late 2023 significantly degraded junta control.

name: Yemen War
overview: Multi-sided conflict that began 2014. Saudi Arabia-led intervention started 2015. Partial ceasefire holds but Houthi Red Sea attacks renewed in 2023.

name: Somalia Conflict
overview: Decades-long conflict with Al-Shabaab insurgency. Federal government supported by AU Mission. Climate shocks exacerbate humanitarian crisis.

name: Nagorno-Karabakh Conflict
overview: Azerbaijan's 2023 offensive ended the Artsakh republic. 100,000+ Armenians fled to Armenia. Peace treaty negotiations underway.

name: Ethiopia-Tigray War
overview: Conflict from November 2020 to November 2022. Pretoria Agreement ended active hostilities. Implementation ongoing with partial disarmament.
